official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and the chunk_batch_start packet id.
Official binary source for constructing, decoding, and writing the chunk_batch_start empty body without initialized game state.
Official binary source for writing and dispatch-decoding the full Play clientbound chunk_batch_start frame.

field_notes.fixture: Uses official ClientboundChunkBatchStartPacket.INSTANCE. The fixture is a context-free singleton with StreamCodec.unit(INSTANCE) and does not require an initialized Level, chunk storage, or game state.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound chunk_batch_start packet framing and dispatch/decode for the official singleton empty-body fixture only; do not infer chunk batch pacing behavior, chunk-load start semantics, chunk-load completion, initialized game state, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
